query: Add JSON-LD structured data to our /blog/$slug route so articles get rich snippets in Google with the author name and publish date
We need BreadcrumbList schema on every page — Home > Category > Current Page. Generate the JSON-LD and wire it into the TanStack Start head() function
Our product pages at src/routes/products/$id.tsx need Product schema with offers, price as string, availability set to InStock, and aggregateRating from our reviews table
Google Search Console is throwing 'missing field image' errors on our Article structured data in production — can you fix the JSON-LD in src/lib/seo/schema.ts?
I want star ratings to show up next to our SaaS product in Google search results. How do I add the right schema for a SoftwareApplication with aggregateRating?
Create a reusable JsonLd component for our TanStack Start app that accepts an array of schema objects and renders them as separate script tags
Add FAQ schema to our pricing page — we have 6 questions/answers in a collapsible accordion. Each question needs its own mainEntity entry in the FAQPage JSON-LD
Our local business page needs LocalBusiness structured data with address, geo coordinates 37.7749/-122.4194, opening hours Mon-Fri 9-5, and a contactPoint for customer service
We're building a recipe site — add Recipe schema to the route at /recipes/$slug with recipeIngredient, recipeInstructions as HowToStep, nutrition info, and prep/cook times in ISO 8601 duration
I pasted our JSON-LD into the Rich Results Test and got 'Incorrect value type for field price' — it's set to 29.99 as a number but Google wants a string. Fix this across all our product schemas
Run a full SEO audit on https://acme.com and give me a scored report with recommendations
Set up og:title, og:description, og:image, and twitter:card meta tags for our blog posts so they look good when shared on LinkedIn
Our database schema for the users table needs a new column for email_verified — can you write the Drizzle migration?
Create a Zod schema for validating the contact form with name, email, and message fields
I need to define the TypeScript interface for our API response — it has id, name, createdAt, and a nested address object
Add a sitemap.xml that lists all our blog posts with lastmod dates and weekly changefreq
Our Typebox schema in the Elysia route validator is rejecting valid requests — the body t.Object has a t.Numeric field but the client sends a string
Write a robots.txt that allows all crawlers but blocks /admin and /api paths
The GraphQL schema needs a new Query type for fetching orders by customer ID with pagination
Validate our Prisma schema file and make sure the relations between User and Post are correct with onDelete cascade
